queries.question: Provide the type of locations associated with each production.
queries.sql: SELECT Locations.Type  from Productions_Locations join Locations on Productions_Locations.LocationID = Locations.LocationID join Productions on Productions_Locations.ProductionID = Productions.ProductionID   GROUP BY Productions_Locations.LocationID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Productions_Locations.ProductionID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Productions)

queries.question: Provide the type of locations associated with each production.
queries.sql: select productions.title , locations.type from Productions_Locations join Locations on Productions_Locations.LocationID = Locations.LocationID join Productions on Productions_Locations.ProductionID = Productions.ProductionID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?type WHERE {
  ?productions_locations a :Productions_Locations .
  ?locations a :Locations .
  ?productions_locations p:hasLocations ?locations .
  ?productions a :Productions .
  ?productions_locations p:hasProductions ?productions .
  ?productions p:Title ?title .
  ?locations p:Type ?type .
}

queries.question: for each production, what are the corresponding location names?
queries.sql: select productions.title , locations.name from Productions_Locations join Locations on Productions_Locations.LocationID = Locations.LocationID join Productions on Productions_Locations.ProductionID = Productions.ProductionID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name WHERE {
  ?productions_locations a :Productions_Locations .
  ?locations a :Locations .
  ?productions_locations p:hasLocations ?locations .
  ?productions a :Productions .
  ?productions_locations p:hasProductions ?productions .
  ?productions p:Title ?title .
  ?locations p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: which names and types of locations are associated with every production?
queries.sql: SELECT Locations.Name, Locations.Type  from Productions_Locations join Locations on Productions_Locations.LocationID = Locations.LocationID join Productions on Productions_Locations.ProductionID = Productions.ProductionID   GROUP BY Productions_Locations.LocationID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Productions_Locations.ProductionID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Productions)

queries.question: which names and types of locations are associated with every production?
queries.sql: select productions.title , locations.name , locations.type from Productions_Locations join Locations on Productions_Locations.LocationID = Locations.LocationID join Productions on Productions_Locations.ProductionID = Productions.ProductionID
